benefits.description: PT141 produced flushing and effects, indicating at least some active compound was present

protocol_notes: User tried PT141 and noted that you cannot fake the flush and effects of PT141. However, user noted everything about the vendor seems over-the-top/too good to be true. Reviews on Trustpilot appear fake, and reviews on website are impossibly universally 5-star. User skeptical about vendor credibility despite PT141 working.
